meta.premise: For each market, the CFTC old-crop bucket degenerates to the crop year's LAST delivery contract as earlier months expire — single-contract cohort positioning.
meta.alignment: dtr = days until the 1st of the (empirically detected) crop-year roll month; rows span the 120 days before the roll.
meta.roll_detection: share_old jumping <0.35 → >0.60 week-over-week; majority month across years.
